questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Properly fed, trained and starved monkeys were made to run through a maze (puzzle). It was seen that starved monkeys could not find their way fast. This proves that the lower intelligence of the poor comes as the result of malnutrition.
Valid Assumption: The effect of malnutrition on the intelligence of the monkeys is parallel to those on human beings.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Banking Services Chronicle is the only magazine that gives exclusive articles on reasoning and quicker mathematics.
Valid Assumptions: I. The advertisement will have some effect on those who read it. II. People look forward to exclusive articles on reasoning and quicker mathematics.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Donate money for the earthquake victims - an appeal.
Valid Assumptions: I. The appeal will have some effect on people. II. There has been an earthquake and the condition of the earthquake victims is pitiable.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Please do not lean out of the running train - a notice in the railway compartment.
Valid Assumptions: I. The people are likely to pay attention to this notice. II. It is the duty of the Railways to issue such notices. III. Leaning out of running trains is dangerous. IV. Not leaning out of running trains ensures safety.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Use aluminium - the versatile metal - for packing - an advertisement.
Invalid Assumption: Aluminium is the only metal used for packing. It is obvious by the statement that aluminium is a versatile metal for packaging. These may be many more but not all would be versatile. Where does one get any hint that aluminium is the only metal possible for packaging?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Get your child examined by a specialist doctor - A tells B.
Invalid Assumption: B will not heed to A's advice. Generally, one advises somebody with an assumption that the advice would be listened to. (See Q. 27, Ex. 3A and its answer). How could we conclude that B will not heed to A's advice?
